title: Sharpened Corners
description: Tired of rounded and boring UI of Minecraft?
body:
#
The UI upgrade you didn’t know you needed. If you are tired of rounded menus, this pack sharpens the corners and gives the entire interface a cleaner, darker look. # Join My Discord Please join my Discord server to report bugs, give suggestions and get more info
[**Angelos' Workshop**](https://discord.gg/qMrDaZZCdG)
# Warning This pack is mostly incompatible with other gui resourcepacks. Use [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) mod for the best experience
